caption: A person wearing a dark blue baseball cap is visible in a small video call window in the upper right corner of a computer screen. The main area of the screen displays a complex digital concept map on a dark background, featuring various circular icons containing images and portraits connected by blue lines. Legible green text labels accompany several of these icons, including "Learning," "Insights," and "Insights/Intuition." A larger rectangular image of a woman is positioned near the center-right of the map. At the top of the screen, multiple browser tabs are open with titles such as "Truth & Learning by Systemsynth," "Society by Systemsynth," and "Road Community Food Spot." As the sequence progresses, the screen transitions from showing the full concept map to a darkened view where most of the map fades into the background, leaving only a few highlighted nodes and the woman's portrait visible.
